# openai_role (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a specific role by name within the OpenAI organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a specific role by name in the organization
data "openai_role" "owner" {
  name = "Owner"
}

# Use the role ID in other resources
output "owner_role_id" {
  value = data.openai_role.owner.role_id
}

output "owner_role_permissions" {
  value = data.openai_role.owner.permissions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role to look up (case-insensitive).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the role.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `permissions` (List of String) Permissions granted by the role.
- `predefined_role` (Boolean) Whether the role is predefined and managed by OpenAI.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type the role is bound to (e.g., 'api.organization').
- `role_id` (String) The ID of the role.
